reasoning: Melania Trump is a naturalized United States citizen and the current First Lady. Deporting a U.S. citizen requires a denaturalization process, which would take years, even if there were any legal basis or political will to do so. Since her husband, Donald Trump, is the head of the executive branch (which oversees ICE and the DOJ), the political and practical probability of the government initiating denaturalization and deportation proceedings against her by June 2025 is effectively zero. The market trades at 1%, and recent news articles confirming this as merely a political talking point from critics further solidify this. Therefore, I assign the minimum possible probability (0.02).
